_meta.rule: Chinese translations are based on English source labels in each EN PNG; do not invent new claims.

knowledge-comp-cycle.png.title_zh: 蒸汽压缩循环 — 突出压缩机

labels.zh: 蒸汽压缩循环 — 突出压缩机

knowledge-comp-hermetic.png.title_zh: 全封闭 · 半封闭 · 开启式

labels.zh: 全封闭 · 半封闭 · 开启式

labels.en: NOTE: Selection depends on application, capacity, maintenance requirements, and site conditions.
labels.zh: 注：选型取决于应用、容量、维护需求与现场条件。
全封闭 · 半封闭 · 开启式驱动
油热应力 / 无油路径

labels.en: Low temperature e.g., air, water, ground

knowledge-comp-map.png.title_en: Performance map at the duty point
knowledge-comp-map.png.title_zh: 工况点上的性能曲线图读法

labels.en: Read the map at your duty point
At your duty point, read capacity and power from the corresponding contours.
labels.zh: 在工况点处，从对应等值线读取容量与功率。

labels.en: Use the side factors to understand how changes affect performance.
labels.zh: 用侧边因素理解变化如何影响性能。

labels.en: Higher displacement shifts capacity and power upward (proportionally).
labels.zh: 更大排量使容量与功率成比例上移。

labels.en: Higher efficiency shifts capacity upward (more capacity for given conditions).
labels.zh: 更高效率使容量上移（相同工况下容量更大）。

labels.en: Higher condensing temperature or lower evaporating temperature increases pressure ratio (moves up and left).
labels.zh: 更高冷凝温度或更低蒸发温度会提高压比（图谱上移向左）。

labels.en: Discharge temperature increases toward the upper-left of the map (higher condensing temperature and/or lower evaporating temperature).
labels.zh: 排气温度向图谱左上增大（冷凝温度更高和/或蒸发温度更低）。

labels.en: Performance map at the duty point
labels.zh: 工况点上的性能曲线图读法

labels.en: Oil is entrained in discharge gas as an oil mist.
labels.zh: 油以油雾形式夹带于排气中。

labels.en: The oil separator captures oil and returns it to the compressor.
labels.zh: 油分离器捕集油并返回压缩机。

labels.en: Oil return line (capillary) must be sized and routed properly.
labels.zh: 回油管（毛细管）须正确选型与布管。

labels.en: Oil hold-up in the evaporator increases liquid slug risk on suction.
labels.zh: 蒸发器积油会增加吸气侧液击风险。

knowledge-comp-types.png.title_zh: 压缩机类型一览（3D 剖视）

labels.en: Piston moves up and down in a cylinder. Suction on the downstroke, compression on the upstroke.
labels.zh: 活塞在气缸内上下运动；下行吸气，上行压缩。

labels.en: Two spiral scrolls orbit. Gas is trapped in pockets that move inward and are compressed continuously.
labels.zh: 两片涡旋相对公转；气体被困在向内移动的腔室中连续压缩。

labels.en: Two intermeshing helical rotors trap and compress gas as it moves axially through the compressor.
labels.zh: 两根啮合螺杆沿轴向输送并压缩气体。

labels.en: A high-speed impeller throws gas outward. Velocity is converted to pressure in the diffuser.
labels.zh: 高速叶轮将气体甩向外侧；速度在扩压器中转为压力。

labels.en: An eccentrically mounted rotor turns in a circular housing. Gas is trapped in chambers and compressed.
labels.zh: 偏心转子在圆形壳体内转动；气体在腔室中被捕获并压缩。
压缩机类型一览（3D 剖视）

labels.en: Unit controller / PLC — I/O and interlocks
labels.zh: 机组控制器 / PLC — I/O 与联锁

labels.en: ANY TRIP OPENS CHAIN -> UNIT SHUTDOWN
labels.zh: 任一跳闸断开联锁链 → 机组停机

labels.en: Safety chain is wired in series.
If any device opens, outputs are de-energized.
labels.zh: 任一器件断开，则输出失电。
看门狗监视控制器健康。

labels.en: Events, alarms, and trends stored locally and in cloud (if connected).
labels.zh: 事件、报警与趋势本地存储，并上云（若已连接）。

labels.en: RELIABLE CONTROL. SAFE OPERATION. MAXIMUM UPTIME.
labels.zh: 可靠控制。安全运行。最大可用率。
远程控制与 IoT 闭环

labels.en: Collects real-time data and executes local control & safety interlocks.
labels.zh: 采集实时数据并执行本地控制与安全联锁。

labels.en: Aggregates, normalizes and securely publishes data to the cloud.
labels.zh: 汇聚、标准化并安全发布数据至云端。
3 云平台与 AI 辅助

labels.en: Turns data into insights and recommended actions.
labels.zh: 将数据转化为洞察与建议动作。

labels.en: Operators review performance, receive alerts and approve actions.
labels.zh: 运维人员查看性能、接收告警并批准动作。

labels.en: Commands are validated and applied by the local controller within limits.
labels.zh: 指令经校验后由本地控制器在限值内执行。

labels.en: Feedback loop: updated setpoints & model learning
labels.zh: 反馈回路：更新设定点与模型学习

labels.en: Performance feedback improves models and future recommendations.
labels.zh: 性能反馈改进模型与后续建议。

labels.en: Safety first: The local controller always enforces hard safety limits and interlocks. Remote commands cannot override hard safety.
labels.zh: 安全优先：本地控制器始终执行硬安全限值与联锁。远程指令不能覆盖硬安全。

knowledge-elec-layers.png.title_en: Electrical layers in a heat-pump package

labels.zh: 数据 / 遥测（以太网 / 云）

labels.en: Electrical layers in a heat-pump package

labels.zh: 压缩机电机 — 全封闭 vs 开启式

labels.en: Motor and compressor share a sealed shell. Windings are bathed in refrigerant-oil mixture for cooling and lubrication.
labels.zh: 电机与压缩机共用密封壳体。绕组浸于制冷剂–油混合物中冷却润滑。
制冷剂–油混合物（冷却与润滑）

labels.en: No shaft seal — no leakage path
labels.zh: 无轴封 — 无泄漏通路
冷却取决于制冷剂与润滑油

labels.en: Replace as a unit (not field serviceable)
labels.zh: 整机更换（现场不可维修）

labels.en: Motor is outside the compressor. Power is transmitted through a shaft with a seal.
labels.zh: 电机在压缩机外。动力经带轴封的轴传递。
环境空气冷却（翅片与风机）
对中关键（安装与检修时检查）

labels.en: Shaft seal is a wear item — requires maintenance
labels.zh: 轴封为磨损件 — 需维护

labels.en: Efficiency can be higher (motor optimised independently)
labels.zh: 效率可更高（电机可独立优化）

labels.en: Both need correct insulation class and start method.
labels.zh: 两者都需正确绝缘等级与启动方式。

labels.en: Main protection against short circuit and overload
Remotely switches power to the load

labels.zh: 由控制回路励磁的线圈
联锁与反馈用辅助触点
过载时断开接触器线圈

labels.en: Steps down to safe control voltage
Power (high current) separated from control (low voltage)
labels.zh: 动力（大电流）与控制（低压）分离
降低噪声并提高安全性
接触器 — 主触点（剖视）
热过载 — 双金属（剖视）

labels.en: Set overload to nameplate FLC — do not raise to stop trips.
labels.zh: 过载按铭牌 FLC 整定 — 勿为止跳闸而抬高。

labels.en: Reduces conducted emissions to the grid.
labels.zh: 降低向电网的传导发射。

labels.en: IGBT bridge generates variable frequency 3-phase AC
labels.zh: IGBT 桥生成变频三相交流
全封闭压缩机电机（交流感应 / PMSM）
恒 V/Hz 时扭矩 ~ Hz²

labels.en: Wide speed range for capacity control
labels.zh: 宽转速范围用于容量控制

labels.en: Harmonics reduced on output with sine-wave filtering
labels.zh: 输出经正弦滤波后谐波降低

labels.en: EMI filters limit interference to meet standards
labels.zh: EMI 滤波器限制干扰以满足标准

labels.en: Protections: overcurrent, overvoltage, overtemp, ground fault, short circuit, phase loss
labels.zh: 保护：过流、过压、过温、接地故障、短路、缺相

labels.en: The VFD adjusts compressor speed to match load — reducing energy use while maintaining precise superheat and system stability.
labels.zh: VFD 调节压缩机转速匹配负荷 — 降低能耗并保持精确过热度与系统稳定。

knowledge-encl-frame.png.title_zh: 机架、面板、门与防护等级

labels.en: Bolted Frame, Folded Sheet-Metal Panels, Hinged Access Door
labels.zh: 螺栓机架、折弯钣金面板、铰链检修门

labels.en: Structural support made from bolted steel frame for strength and stability.
labels.zh: 螺栓钢架结构支撑，提供强度与稳定性。

labels.en: Folded sheet-metal panels provide enclosure and weather protection.
labels.zh: 折弯钣金面板形成机壳并提供防风雨。

labels.en: Hinged access door allows service access to internal components.
labels.zh: 铰链检修门便于触及内部部件。

labels.en: IP54 protection against limited dust ingress and splashing water from any direction.
labels.zh: IP54：防有限粉尘进入与任意方向溅水。
机架、面板、门与防护等级

knowledge-encl-role.png.title_en: Enclosure roles in a heat-pump package

labels.en: The steel frame provides structural support.
The door allows access for service.
The ground connection bonds the enclosure to earth for safety.
labels.zh: 接地将机壳可靠接至大地以保证安全。

labels.en: Enclosure roles in a heat-pump package
CABLE TRAY ROUTING INSIDE HEAT PUMP ENCLOSURE
Proper cable routing improves reliability and serviceability. Follow minimum bend radius and secure cables at recommended tie points.
labels.zh: 正确布线提高可靠性与可维护性。遵循最小弯曲半径并在推荐绑扎点固定。

labels.en: Maintain minimum bend radius. R ≥ 10 x cable OD
labels.zh: 保持最小弯曲半径。R ≥ 10 × 电缆外径

labels.en: Use cable tray or ladder for mechanical protection
labels.zh: 用线槽或桥架提供机械保护

labels.en: Secure cables at regular intervals using tie points
labels.zh: 按间隔在绑扎点固定电缆

labels.en: Maintain minimum bend radius to prevent damage
labels.zh: 保持最小弯曲半径以防损坏

labels.en: Provide strain relief at all panel entries
labels.zh: 所有柜体入口提供应力释放

labels.en: Keep power and signal cables separated as required
labels.zh: 按要求分离动力与信号电缆

labels.en: Follow all applicable codes and manufacturer instructions
labels.zh: 遵循所有适用规范与制造商说明

labels.en: Keep power and signal circuits separate to improve EMC performance and reduce noise coupling.
labels.zh: 动力与信号回路分开，以改善 EMC 并降低噪声耦合。

labels.en: Signal / sensor cables in separate tray
labels.zh: 信号/传感器电缆独立线槽

labels.en: Physical separation between power and signal circuits
labels.zh: 动力与信号回路物理分隔

labels.en: Cable shield connected to chassis at entry to drain high-frequency noise
labels.zh: 电缆屏蔽在入口处接机壳以泄放高频噪声

labels.en: Separate power and signal cables in different trays or compartments.
labels.zh: 动力与信号电缆分槽或分仓敷设。

labels.en: Maintain adequate distance between power and signal paths.
labels.zh: 动力与信号路径保持足够间距。

labels.en: Terminate cable shields 360° to chassis at panel entry.
labels.zh: 在柜体入口将电缆屏蔽 360° 端接至机壳。

labels.en: Avoid running cables above variable speed drives and switching devices.
labels.zh: 避免电缆从变频与开关装置上方穿越。
叠板 · 紧凑水侧工况
壳体 + 管束 · 工业工况
空气盘管 · A2W 室外
蓝箭头 = 二次侧 / 冷侧
红箭头 = 一次侧 / 热侧

labels.en: Boundaries overlap by brand, fluid, and duty — confirm with OEM software.
labels.zh: 边界因品牌、工质与工况重叠 — 请用 OEM 软件确认。
制冷油充注与污染控制

labels.en: Clean Oil In → Clean System → Reliable Operation
labels.zh: 洁净进油 → 洁净系统 → 可靠运行

labels.en: Use oil specified by equipment manufacturer
labels.zh: 使用设备制造商指定油品

labels.en: Store sealed in clean, dry area
labels.zh: 密封存放于清洁干燥处

labels.en: Evacuate system to required vacuum level
Charge oil through low point using clean, dry equipment
labels.zh: 用洁净干燥设备从低点充油

labels.en: Break vacuum with dry refrigerant only
labels.zh: 仅用干燥制冷剂破真空

labels.en: Maintain proper oil level in compressor
Ensure good oil circulation and return
labels.zh: 保证良好油循环与回油

labels.en: May lead to ice or sludge
Can plug oil passages and strainers
Contaminants degrade oil and harm equipment
labels.zh: 污染物劣化油品并伤害设备

labels.en: Check oil condition at regular intervals
Identify and correct the source of contamination
Use properly sized filter-drier to remove moisture and acid
labels.zh: 选用合适干燥过滤器除去水分与酸

labels.en: Change oil if degraded, contaminated, or after component failure
labels.zh: 油劣化、污染或部件故障后换油

labels.en: Evacuate system and recharge with clean oil
labels.zh: 抽空系统并充入洁净油

labels.en: Record oil type, charge amount, and condition
labels.zh: 记录油型、充注量与状态

labels.en: Clean oil protects equipment, improves efficiency, and extends system life.
labels.zh: 洁净油保护设备、提高效率并延长寿命。

knowledge-lub-cycle.png.title_en: Oil path in the refrigeration cycle

labels.en: Oil lubricates bearings, pistons, and other moving parts.
labels.zh: 油润滑轴承、活塞及其他运动件。

labels.en: Oil mist is removed from the discharge gas. Clean refrigerant continues to the condenser.
labels.zh: 从排气中除去油雾；洁净制冷剂继续进入冷凝器。

labels.en: Metered oil return via capillary tube back to compressor crankcase.
labels.zh: 经毛细管计量回油至压缩机曲轴箱。

labels.en: A thin oil film remains on internal tube surfaces, returning to the compressor with refrigerant.
labels.zh: 管内壁残留薄油膜，随制冷剂返回压缩机。

labels.en: Refrigerant is compressed. Oil is entrained in the discharge gas as mist.
labels.zh: 制冷剂被压缩；油以雾状夹带在排气中。

labels.en: Oil mist is removed in the separator. Clean refrigerant flows to the condenser.
labels.zh: 油雾在油分中被除去；洁净制冷剂流向冷凝器。

labels.en: Oil is metered through a capillary tube back to the compressor sump.
labels.zh: 油经毛细管计量返回压缩机油池。

labels.en: Refrigerant rejects heat in the condenser and condenses to liquid.
labels.zh: 制冷剂在冷凝器放热并冷凝为液体。

labels.en: Liquid refrigerant is metered through the expansion device.
labels.zh: 液态制冷剂经膨胀装置节流。

labels.en: Refrigerant absorbs heat in the evaporator. Oil film returns to the compressor.
labels.zh: 制冷剂在蒸发器吸热；油膜返回压缩机。

labels.en: Oil path in the refrigeration cycle

labels.zh: 制冷润滑油族系 — 对照

labels.en: Typical properties and refrigerant compatibility guide
labels.zh: 典型特性与工质兼容性导读

labels.en: Not recommended with most HFC or HFO
Not recommended with HCFC, HFO, ammonia or CO2
Some use with CO2 (with appropriate additives)
labels.zh: CO2 可用（需合适添加剂）
与 HFC 互溶性极高
使用 HCFC 的旧系统（如 R-22）
配矿物油的往复压缩机

labels.en: Some HFC systems (where miscibility is adequate)
labels.zh: 部分 HFC 系统（互溶足够时）
与 HFC 互溶性因牌号而异。

labels.en: Hygroscopic – keep system clean and sealed.
labels.zh: 吸湿——保持系统洁净密封。
CO2 跨临界系统（需合适添加剂）

labels.en: Additive package may be required for wear protection in CO2 systems.
labels.zh: CO2 系统可能需抗磨添加剂包。

labels.en: Lubricant viscosity decreases as temperature increases.
labels.zh: 润滑油粘度随温度升高而降低。

labels.en: The viscosity must stay within an optimal window for reliable lubrication across operating conditions.
labels.zh: 粘度须保持在适宜窗口，以在全工况可靠润滑。

labels.en: High viscosity at low temperature for film thickness and wear protection.
labels.zh: 低温高粘度以保证油膜厚度与抗磨。

labels.en: Viscosity must remain above the lower limit to maintain lubrication and prevent wear.
labels.zh: 粘度须保持在下限之上以维持润滑并防止磨损。

labels.en: A measure of a fluid's resistance to flow. Essential for forming a protective lubricant film between moving parts.
labels.zh: 流体流动阻力的量度；用于在运动件间形成保护油膜。

labels.en: Reduces wear and extends component life
Supports reliable performance across wide temperature range
labels.zh: 在宽温区内支持可靠性能

labels.en: Higher viscosity – better film strength at high temperature
labels.zh: 更高粘度 — 高温油膜强度更好

labels.en: Lower viscosity – better low temperature fluidity
labels.zh: 更低粘度 — 低温流动性更好

labels.en: Select the appropriate ISO VG grade to ensure viscosity stays within the optimal window from cold start to high discharge temperature.
labels.zh: 选择合适 ISO VG，使从冷启动到高排气温度粘度仍落在窗口内。

labels.en: Steel or copper pipe provides structural strength.
labels.zh: 钢管或铜管提供结构强度。

labels.en: Zinc coating (hot-dip) provides sacrificial corrosion protection.
labels.zh: 热浸锌涂层提供牺牲阳极防腐。

labels.en: Epoxy or fusion-bonded epoxy provides a barrier against moisture, chemicals, and abrasion.
labels.zh: 环氧或熔结环氧形成防潮、防化学品与耐磨屏障。

labels.en: Provides inherent corrosion resistance without the need for galvanizing or protective coatings in many environments.
labels.zh: 许多环境下具固有耐蚀性，无需镀锌或防护涂层。

labels.en: The zinc layer corrodes preferentially to the base metal (sacrificial protection).
labels.zh: 锌层相对基材优先腐蚀（牺牲阳极保护）。

labels.en: The outer coating acts as a barrier to prevent exposure to corrosive elements, extending the service life of the pipe.
labels.zh: 外涂层形成屏障，防止腐蚀介质侵蚀，延长管道寿命。

knowledge-pipe-cycle.png.title_en: Refrigerant piping roles in the cycle
knowledge-pipe-cycle.png.title_zh: 循环中的制冷剂管路角色

labels.zh: 室内机（制热模式为蒸发器）
室外机（制热模式为冷凝器）

labels.en: Use traps if riser > 20 ft. (6 m)
labels.zh: 立管 > 20 ft（6 m）时设存油弯

labels.en: At low points every 20-30 ft. (6-9 m)
labels.zh: 每隔 20–30 ft（6–9 m）在低点设置

labels.en: Install vibration isolators near the compressor and at regular intervals.
labels.zh: 在压缩机附近及按间隔安装隔振器。

labels.en: Diagram shows heating mode. Refrigerant flow reverses in cooling mode.
labels.zh: 图示为制热模式。制冷模式下制冷剂流向相反。

labels.en: Follow manufacturer recommendations and applicable codes.
labels.zh: 遵循制造商建议与适用规范。

labels.en: Keep piping runs as short and direct as possible.
Minimize the number of elbows and fittings.
Use proper line sizing for capacity and oil return.
labels.zh: 按容量与回油正确选型管径。

labels.en: Pressure test and evacuate per standard practice.
labels.zh: 按标准做法试压与抽真空。

labels.en: Seal insulation and avoid heat gain.
Do not route near sleeping areas if possible.
labels.zh: 尽量勿靠近休息区布管。
需要时使用耐高温保温。

labels.en: Install filter drier and sight glass.
labels.zh: 安装干燥过滤器与视液镜。

labels.en: Protect from physical damage and heat sources.
labels.zh: 防止机械损伤与热源影响。

labels.en: Proper oil return is critical for compressor life.
labels.zh: 正确回油对压缩机寿命至关重要。

labels.en: Pitch suction line up toward compressor.
labels.zh: 吸气管向压缩机方向上坡。

labels.en: Use oil traps at low points.
For vertical risers > 20 ft. (6 m), use traps.
labels.zh: 立管高度 > 20 ft（6 m）时设置存油弯。

labels.en: Ensure adequate velocity in suction line.
labels.zh: 确保吸气管有足够流速。

labels.en: Refrigerant piping roles in the cycle
labels.zh: 循环中的制冷剂管路角色

labels.en: If the cold pipe surface temperature is below the dew point of the surrounding air, moisture will condense on the pipe.
labels.zh: 若冷管表面温度低于周围空气露点，管壁会结露。

labels.en: Closed-cell foam reduces heat gain and prevents condensation.
labels.zh: 闭孔泡沫减少得热并防止结露。

labels.en: Prevents moisture from entering the insulation.
REFRIGERANT PIPE SIZING AND SUPPORT SPACING
labels.zh: 制冷剂管径与支撑间距

labels.en: Refrigerant piping must be properly sized, supported, and sloped to ensure oil return and system reliability. Provide adequate support spacing and install oil traps at risers.
labels.zh: 制冷剂配管须正确选型、支撑与坡度，以保证回油与系统可靠性。提供足够支撑间距并在立管设存油弯。

labels.en: Slope horizontal piping in the direction of refrigerant flow.
labels.zh: 水平配管沿制冷剂流向设坡。

labels.en: Minimum slope: 1% (10 mm per meter) toward the flow direction.
labels.zh: 最小坡度：沿流向 1%（每米 10 mm）。

labels.en: Install oil traps at the base of risers greater than 6 m (20 ft).
labels.zh: 立管高度大于 6 m（20 ft）时在底部设存油弯。

labels.en: Ensure all piping is securely supported and protected from vibration.
labels.zh: 确保管路可靠支撑并防振。

labels.en: Follow manufacturer guidelines and applicable codes.
labels.zh: 遵循制造商指南与适用规范。

labels.en: Secures the pipe to the support
Rubber isolator reduces vibration transmission to the structure
labels.zh: 橡胶隔振器降低向结构传递的振动

labels.en: Prevents stress on the piping system
Proper support selection and installation help prevent vibration, reduce noise, and protect the piping system from stress caused by thermal expansion and contraction.
labels.zh: 正确选型与安装支吊架可防振、降噪，并保护配管免受热胀冷缩应力。

knowledge-ref-gwp-landscape.png.title_zh: 常用工质 GWP 景观

labels.en: GWP landscape for heat pump fluids (schematic)
labels.zh: 热泵工质 GWP 格局（示意）

labels.en: Legacy HFC (declining) — R410A, R134a, R245fa — GWP 675—4000+
labels.zh: 传统 HFC（递减）— R410A, R134a, R245fa — GWP 675—4000+

labels.en: Application temperature band → Comfort HP / Commercial / Industrial & HTHP
labels.zh: 应用温度带 → 舒适热泵 / 商用 / 工业与 HTHP

labels.en: Not a property chart — confirm values in engineering datasheets
labels.zh: 非物性表 — 请以工程数据表确认数值
常用工质 GWP 景观

labels.en: International policy framework for refrigerants & heat pumps
labels.zh: 制冷剂与热泵国际政策框架

labels.en: Montreal Protocol (1987) — ODS phase-out — CFC, HCFC
labels.zh: 蒙特利尔议定书（1987）— ODS 淘汰 — CFC, HCFC
基加利修正案（2016）— HFC 削减
京都议定书（1997）— 温室气体目标
巴黎协定（2015）— NDCs、净零、电气化

labels.en: Fluid choice ← Montreal / Kigali + national F-gas law
labels.zh: 工质选择 ← 蒙特利尔 / 基加利 + 国家 F-gas 法规

labels.en: Deployment scale ← Paris / electrification & grid decarbonisation
labels.zh: 部署规模 ← 巴黎协定 / 电气化与电网脱碳

labels.en: Only Montreal & Kigali directly regulate refrigerants; Kyoto & Paris drive heat pump adoption context
labels.zh: 仅蒙特利尔与基加利直接管制制冷剂；京都与巴黎协定驱动热泵推广背景

labels.en: China · EU · United States — regulatory eras (schematic)
labels.zh: 中国 · 欧盟 · 美国 — 监管时代（示意）
生态环境部 HFC 配额
分体空调自 2025 起 GWP≤750

labels.en: Three jurisdictions, three clocks — never assume one global ban date
labels.zh: 三个辖区、三套时间表 — 切勿假定全球统一禁令日期
第4代 HFO / 低 GWP 混配
工业天然工质 — 持续并行路径

labels.en: *Generations overlap in time; treaty dates are orientation markers only.
labels.zh: *各代在时间上重叠；条约日期仅作方位参考。

labels.en: Heat Pump Inline Production Test Bench
100% testing of every unit – Leak, Safety, Function
labels.zh: 每台 100% 检测 – 泄漏、安全、功能

labels.en: Refrigerant circuit pressurised with forming gas (N2)
labels.zh: 制冷剂回路用成形气体（N2）加压

labels.en: Quality built in at every step. Test. Verify. Improve. Repeat.
labels.zh: 每一步内建质量。测试。验证。改进。循环。

labels.en: Record results, maintain traceability, ensure accountability.
labels.zh: 记录结果、保持可追溯、落实责任。

labels.en: Review data, identify trends, and drive continuous improvement.
labels.zh: 审阅数据、识别趋势并推动持续改进。

labels.en: Address root causes, update standards, prevent recurrence.
labels.zh: 处理根因、更新标准、防止再发。

labels.en: Build skills, share best practices, standardize work.
labels.zh: 培养技能、共享最佳实践、标准化作业。

labels.en: Controlled source (evaporator) and sink (condenser) conditions with instrumentation and performance monitoring
labels.zh: 受控热源（蒸发器）与热汇（冷凝器）工况，配仪表与性能监视
数据本地存储并可导出（CSV）

labels.en: Essential tools for installation, commissioning and service
labels.zh: 安装、调试与维修必备工具

labels.en: Evacuates air and moisture from the refrigerant circuit to ensure efficient and reliable system operation.
labels.zh: 抽除制冷剂回路中的空气与水分，保证高效可靠运行。

labels.en: Recovers, evacuates and charges refrigerant with precision for safe and accurate system commissioning.
labels.zh: 精确回收、抽真空与充注制冷剂，确保安全准确调试。

labels.en: Detects refrigerant leaks quickly and accurately to help ensure system integrity.
labels.zh: 快速准确检测制冷剂泄漏，保障系统完整性。

labels.en: Applies the correct torque to flare nuts and fasteners to prevent leaks and ensure reliable connections.
labels.zh: 对喇叭口螺母与紧固件施加正确扭矩，防止泄漏并保证可靠连接。

labels.en: Always follow manufacturer instructions and local regulations. Use appropriate PPE and safe handling practices.
labels.zh: 始终遵循制造商说明与当地法规。使用合适 PPE 与安全操作。

knowledge-valve-reversing.png.title_zh: 四通换向阀 — 制热/制冷路径

labels.en: 4-way reversing valve · heating vs cooling paths
labels.zh: 四通换向阀 · 制热/制冷路径

labels.en: D connects to E, C connects to S
labels.zh: D 接 E，C 接 S

labels.en: D connects to C, E connects to S
labels.zh: D 接 C，E 接 S

labels.en: Stuck mid-stroke bypasses high to low and kills capacity.
labels.zh: 卡在行程中间会使高低压旁通并丧失能力。
四通换向阀 — 制热/制冷路径

knowledge-valve-txv-eev.png.title_zh: TXV 与 EEV — 过热度控制

labels.en: TXV vs EEV — control of superheat
labels.zh: TXV 与 EEV — 过热度控制
感温包充注与位置关键
温度传感器（蒸发器出口）
两者都以蒸发器过热度为目标 —

labels.en: EEV is a control interface, not a more expensive TXV.
labels.zh: EEV 是控制接口，并非更贵的 TXV。
TXV 与 EEV — 过热度控制

labels.en: Thermostatic expansion - meters liquid / holds SH
labels.zh: 热力膨胀 — 计量液体 / 维持过热度
电子膨胀 — 步进 + 传感器

labels.en: Water-side actuators are separate — keep refrigerant and hydronic BOMs apart.
labels.zh: 水侧执行器单独 — 制冷剂与水侧 BOM 分开。

knowledge-vessel-accum.png.title_zh: 回气集液器 — 防液击

labels.zh: 回气集液器 — 防液击

labels.en: Prevents liquid refrigerant from reaching the compressor by separating and holding liquid at low velocity, allowing only vapor to pass to the compressor.
labels.zh: 在低速下分离并暂存液体，仅让蒸汽通往压缩机，防止液态制冷剂进入压缩机。

labels.en: Low-temp evaporators with high load variation
labels.zh: 负荷波动大的低温蒸发器

labels.en: Systems with long suction lines or floodback potential
labels.zh: 长吸气管或可能回液的系统

labels.en: Protects compressors from liquid slugging and damage
labels.zh: 保护压缩机免受液击与损坏

labels.en: Only vapor passes through to the compressor.
Slows down incoming flow and directs it against the vessel wall to drop out liquid.
labels.zh: 减缓进流并导向器壁以沉降液体。

labels.en: Liquid refrigerant collects here. Volume is sized to handle system surges and variations.
labels.zh: 液态制冷剂在此汇集。容积按系统冲击与波动设计。

labels.en: Oil carried with the vapor condenses in the accumulator and returns to the system through the U-bend or orifice pick-up.
labels.zh: 随蒸汽携带的油在气液分离器中冷凝，经 U 弯或取油孔返回系统。

labels.en: Holds back liquid during normal operation and surges so only vapor reaches the compressor.
labels.zh: 正常运行与冲击时拦截液体，使仅蒸汽到达压缩机。

labels.en: Oil returns to the compressor only when carried with vapor. Too much liquid hold-up can trap oil and cause oil starvation. Size the accumulator correctly.
labels.zh: 油仅随蒸汽返回压缩机。积液过多会困油导致缺油。气液分离器须正确选型。

labels.en: Size for system capacity and surge
labels.zh: 按系统容量与冲击选型

labels.en: Insulate to prevent sweat and icing
Ensure oil return path is always open
labels.zh: 确保回油通路始终畅通
在气液分离器中收集并暂存
经 U 弯随蒸汽返回

knowledge-vessel-cycle.png.title_zh: 蒸汽压缩循环 — 突出容器

labels.zh: 蒸汽压缩循环 — 突出容器
TXV / EEV + 节流 + 过热度控制

labels.en: Removes oil from hot discharge gas before the condenser.
labels.zh: 在冷凝器前从热排气中除油。

labels.en: Oil returns to the compressor via float, differential and check valve.
labels.zh: 油经浮球、压差与止回阀返回压缩机。

labels.en: Prevents liquid slugging of the compressor.
Stores refrigerant during low load and defrost.
labels.zh: 低负荷与除霜时储存制冷剂。

labels.en: Keeps the compressor safe and stable.
Stores liquid refrigerant at high pressure.
labels.zh: 在高压下储存液态制冷剂。

labels.en: Provides steady supply to the expansion device.
Ensures stable feed and system capacity.
labels.zh: 保证稳定供液与系统能力。
4 闪蒸/经济器罐（中间压力）

labels.en: Separates vapor and liquid at intermediate pressure.
Improves capacity and efficiency; reduces compressor work.
labels.zh: 提高容量与效率；降低压缩机功耗。

labels.en: Supports efficiency and low compressor ratio.
labels.zh: 有利于效率与较低压缩比。

labels.en: Start diagnostics at oil return and liquid management.
labels.zh: 诊断从回油与液体管理入手。

labels.en: Good oil return, proper subcooling and safe suction = reliable system.
labels.zh: 良好回油、合适过冷与安全吸气 = 可靠系统。

knowledge-vessel-flash.png.title_zh: 闪蒸罐 / 经济器容器

labels.zh: 闪蒸罐 / 经济器容器

labels.en: Separates high-pressure liquid into vapor and liquid at an intermediate pressure for efficient multi-stage compression and high-lift (HTHP) systems.
labels.zh: 在中间压力将高压液体分离为汽液，服务高效多级压缩与大温升（HTHP）系统。

labels.en: To compressor mid-injection port or economizer port
labels.zh: 至压缩机中间喷注口或经济器口

labels.en: High-pressure liquid enters and flashes to an intermediate pressure. Vapor separates from liquid.
labels.zh: 高压液体进入并闪蒸至中间压力。蒸汽与液体分离。

labels.en: Operating pressure is between condenser (high side) and evaporator (low side).
labels.zh: 运行压力介于冷凝器（高压侧）与蒸发器（低压侧）之间。

labels.en: To lower expansion stage (EXV / TXV / Valve)
labels.zh: 至下级膨胀级（EXV / TXV / 阀门）

labels.en: Maintains proper liquid level in the vessel to ensure stable separation and protect the compressor from liquid carryover.
labels.zh: 维持容器合适液位，保证稳定分离并防止液体带入压缩机。

labels.en: or Electronic level sensor with control valve
labels.zh: 或电子液位传感器配控制阀

labels.en: Reduces compression ratio per stage, improves efficiency, and increases system capacity for high-temperature heat pump and industrial systems.
labels.zh: 降低每级压缩比、提高效率，并提升高温热泵与工业系统容量。

labels.en: Improve compressor reliability and system efficiency
labels.zh: 提高压缩机可靠性与系统效率

knowledge-vessel-oil.png.title_zh: 油分离器 — 排气路径

labels.zh: 油分离器 — 排气路径

labels.en: Separates entrained oil from discharge gas and returns it to the compressor.
labels.zh: 从排气中分离夹带油并返回压缩机。

labels.en: Hot, high-pressure gas with entrained oil mist enters tangentially.
labels.zh: 夹带油雾的高温高压气体切向进入。

labels.en: Tangential entry creates a vortex that drives oil droplets to the wall.
labels.zh: 切向入口形成涡流，将油滴甩向壁面。

labels.en: Oil droplets collide with the coalescing pad, merge into larger drops, and drain downward.
labels.zh: 油滴撞击聚结垫、合并成大滴并向下排出。

labels.en: Cleaned, oil-free gas exits the top and flows to the condenser.
labels.zh: 洁净无油气体从顶部排出并流向冷凝器。

labels.en: Oil is returned to the compressor crankcase through a calibrated capillary (or orifice) for proper metering.
labels.zh: 油经标定毛细管（或孔口）计量返回压缩机曲轴箱。

labels.en: Collected oil accumulates in the sump.
labels.zh: 分离出的油积聚在油池。

labels.en: At part load, system pressure differential decreases. The capillary restricts oil flow to match compressor oil consumption, preventing oil carryover and overfeeding.
labels.zh: 部分负荷时系统压差减小。毛细管限制油流量以匹配压缩机耗油，防止带油与过量回油。

labels.en: Oil separator protects system efficiency and reliability by removing oil from discharge gas and returning it to the compressor.
labels.zh: 油分离器从排气中除油并回油至压缩机，保障效率与可靠性。

labels.en: Space above liquid level accommodates vapor during load changes and pump-down.
labels.zh: 液位上方空间在负荷变化与泵下时容纳蒸汽。

labels.en: Maintains steady supply of liquid to the system. (Sight glass or float indicator)
labels.zh: 向系统稳定供液。（视液镜或浮球指示）

labels.en: Vapor space and internal volume provide storage for refrigerant during pump-down.
labels.zh: 蒸汽空间与内部容积在泵下时储存制冷剂。

labels.en: Extra volume assures adequate refrigerant inventory during normal operation and load changes.
labels.zh: 额外容积保证正常运行与负荷变化时有足够制冷剂存量。

labels.en: Protects receiver from overpressure. Discharge to a safe location.
labels.zh: 保护储液器过压。排放至安全位置。

labels.en: To liquid line / expansion valve (High-pressure liquid)
labels.zh: 至液管 / 膨胀阀（高压液体）

labels.en: Ensures steady supply to expansion device
labels.zh: 保证向膨胀装置稳定供液

labels.en: Store liquid refrigerant after the condenser — provide capacity, stability, and a clean supply to the system.
labels.zh: 在冷凝器后储存液态制冷剂 — 提供存量、稳定性与洁净供液。

labels.en: Removes and returns oil from discharge gas.
Oil return capillary To compressor crankcase
labels.zh: 回油毛细管至压缩机曲轴箱

labels.en: Keep oil out of the system and return it to the compressor.
labels.zh: 使油离开系统回路并返回压缩机。

labels.en: Prevents liquid slugging; stores refrigerant and returns oil.
labels.zh: 防止液击；储存制冷剂并回油。

labels.en: Protects compressor from liquid and ensures oil return.
labels.zh: 保护压缩机免受液体冲击并保证回油。

labels.en: Stores liquid refrigerant; provides supply and system protection.
labels.zh: 储存液态制冷剂；提供供液与系统保护。

labels.en: Provides liquid inventory and a stable supply to the system.
labels.zh: 提供液体存量并向系统稳定供液。

labels.en: Separates flash gas from liquid; supplies vapor for injection/economizing.
labels.zh: 分离闪蒸气体与液体；为喷气/经济器供汽。
来自冷凝器的高压液体

labels.en: To injection port or economizer circuit
labels.zh: 至喷注口或经济器回路

labels.en: Improves efficiency and capacity control via vapor injection or subcooling.
labels.zh: 通过喷气或过冷提高效率与容量控制。

labels.en: Quote functional duty, not catalog nickname alone.
labels.zh: 按功能工况报价，勿仅凭产品俗称。
